# `Wait`

**Systems:** MOS6502, Z80, Z180  
**Parameters:** `b`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<p>Waits [parameter 1]*4+2 cycles. 
<p>Example: Wait(10) waits for 42 cycles and equals
<code>
asm("
  ldx #10
  dex
  bne *-1
")
</code>

</div>
